title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Supertech

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Supertech
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
